title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Dineout - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Dineout - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Dineout are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Pune. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dineout:
Dineout is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dineout!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
